SEARCH
Package org.javalabs.jpa.query

Class SelectQuery

java.lang.Object
org.javalabs.jpa.query.DatabaseQuery
org.javalabs.jpa.query.SelectQuery
All Implemented Interfaces:
Query
Direct Known Subclasses:
NativeJdbcQuery
public class SelectQuery extends DatabaseQuery
Select Object Query class.

This class is used by the EntityManager to fetch a record by it's primary key, from the underlying db.

Author:
Sudiptasish Chanda

    • addPk

      public void addPk(Object pk)
      Add the primary key of the entity to this query object.
      Parameters:
      pk -

    • setLockModeType

      public void setLockModeType(jakarta.persistence.LockModeType lockMode)
      Set the lock mode type. If the lock mode is set to PESSIMISTIC_READ or PESSIMISTIC_WRITE, then an exclusive row level lock would be obtained.
      Parameters:
      lockMode -

    • getLockModeType

      public jakarta.persistence.LockModeType getLockModeType()

      Set additional hint or other vendor level properties.
      Parameters:
      properties -

    • execute

      public Object execute() throws SQLException
      Description copied from interface: Query
      Execute a database query and return the result. Here it is expected that the query to be build by the underlying framework and made it available to this API.
      Returns:
      Object Result set object.
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • execute

      public Object execute(String query) throws SQLException
      Description copied from interface: Query
      Execute a database query and return the result. This API accepts the raw sql query and executes it against the DB.
      Parameters:
      query - SQL query to be executed.
      Returns:
      Object Result set object.
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • dbQuery

      protected String dbQuery()
      Description copied from class: DatabaseQuery
      Return the database query.
      Specified by:
      dbQuery in class DatabaseQuery
      Returns:
      String

    • prepare

      protected List<Object> prepare(PreparedStatement pStmt) throws SQLException
      Prepare the statement by substituting the placeholders with the bind variables.
      Parameters:
      pStmt - Prepared statement for the select query.
      Returns:
      List Of bind variables in the order they were added.
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • log

      private void log(String query, List<Object> params)
      If verbose is on, then dump the database query along with the bind parameters.
      Parameters:
      query - DB query to be executed.
      params - Bind variables.
